title: geranium parviflorum
intro: Geranium parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered geranium, is a flowering plant in the geranium genus native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Geranium parviflorum include its ability to act as a diuretic and to help regulate menstrual cycles, making it useful in treating conditions such as uterine cramps and PMS symptoms. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and alleviating stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Geranium parviflorum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
